PVP & Warfare

Join epic interstellar wars and prove your strength in battle

Home›PVP Warfare

Mine War — Core PVP Gameplay

Mine War is the core PVP content of RF ONLINE NEXT. Three races wage massive faction battles in the Holystone Mines. The mines are the only source of Holystone energy — the key material for crafting ultimate weapons and top-tier equipment. The race controlling the mine gains massive resource income, making Mine Wars the ultimate stage measuring faction strength.

Mine War Requirements

Level: ≥30 | Must join a guild | Weekly fixed schedule | Qualifiers determine participating guilds | 7-day mining rights after capturing mines

Target Priority

Prioritize destroying enemy defense towers and control points rather than just chasing kills. Capturing points is the key to winning Mine Wars.

Formation & Coordination

Frontline Dreadnought absorbs fire, mid-line Punisher and Cipher output, back-line Informer heals and Technician supports. Maintaining formation is far more important than individual kills.

Mecha Timing

Ultimate weapons (MAU/Launcher/Animus) should be summoned in concentration after enemy defenses are weakened to create breakthrough offensives — don't waste them at the start.

Intel & Recon

Deploy Ghost Bio Suit to scout enemy deployment, predict their attack direction and mecha summon timing — know your enemy and yourself.

Guild Wars

Guild Wars are competitive battles between guilds of the same race. The strongest guild is selected through qualifiers to represent the race in Mine Wars. Guild battles use 5v5 or 10v10 squad modes, testing team coordination and individual skill.

Guild War TypePlayersWin ConditionMain Rewards
Guild Arena5v5Wipe enemy / more survivors at timeoutGuild Contribution, Arena Coins
Guild Territory War10v10Hold center point for 3 minutesTerritory Buff, Rare Materials
Mine War Qualifiers20v20Points system, highest-scoring guild winsMine War Qualification

Arena — Solo PVP

Arena offers 1v1 and 3v3 modes — the best place to test individual skill and Bio Suit combinations. Season-based ranking system grants top players exclusive titles and cosmetic rewards.

1v1 Recommended Bio Suits

S-Tier: Ghost | A-Tier: Dreadnought, Cipher | Bio Suit switching timing is the key to victory — master 2 Bio Suits for flexible switching.

3v3 Recommended Lineup

Tank + DPS + Healer is the golden combo. Dreadnought + Cipher + Informer balances offense and defense — one of the strongest three-man lineups in the current version.

General Tips

Use the flight system for vertical mobility to dodge many ground-based skills. Aerial combos combined with Bio Suit switching separate pros from casual players.

Advanced PVP Tactics

Counter Relationships

Ghost counters Cipher (high mobility backline dive), Dreadnought counters Ghost (high defense absorbs burst), Cipher counters Dreadnought (ranged kite tank). Understanding Bio Suit counters is PVP basics.

  1. Always stay mobile — stationary targets are sitting ducks. Use flight and dodge to maintain mobility.
  2. Watch the minimap — information is life in large-scale PVP. Predicting enemy movements beats raw reaction.
  3. Use ultimate weapons wisely — long cooldown, find the right window to deploy without interruption.
  4. Team voice communication — in guild wars and mine wars, voice comms are far more efficient than text.
  5. Targeted gear setup — prioritize PVP stats like Tenacity and Critical Resistance for PVP gear.
  6. Watch and learn from pros — top 100 arena match replays are the best learning material.
  7. Join every Mine War — real combat is the fastest way to grow. Don't fear losing.
